description: CrashLoopBackOff: container exits with code 1 due to missing required environment variable

fixtures.pods:
NAME                             READY   STATUS             RESTARTS   AGE    IP           NODE
crashloop-demo-7d9f8b6c5-xk2qp   0/1     CrashLoopBackOff   14         22m    10.244.0.5   doctor-lab-control-plane
fixtures.describe:
Name:                   crashloop-demo
Namespace:              doctor-lab
Labels:                 app=crashloop-demo
Replicas:               1 desired | 1 updated | 1 total | 0 available | 1 unavailable
Pod Template:
  Containers:
   app:
    Image:      busybox:1.36
    Command:
      sh
      -c
      echo 'FATAL: missing required config'; exit 1
Conditions:
  Available      False   MinimumReplicasUnavailable
Events:
  Warning  BackOff    2m    kubelet  Back-off restarting failed container
fixtures.events:
LAST SEEN   TYPE      REASON    OBJECT                                MESSAGE
2m          Warning   BackOff   pod/crashloop-demo-7d9f8b6c5-xk2qp   Back-off restarting failed container
22m         Warning   Failed    pod/crashloop-demo-7d9f8b6c5-xk2qp   Error: failed to create containerd task: exit code 1

description: ImagePullBackOff: image tag does not exist in registry

fixtures.pods:
NAME                              READY   STATUS             RESTARTS   AGE    IP       NODE
imagepull-demo-5c8d9f7b4-vp3mw   0/1     ImagePullBackOff   0          8m     <none>   doctor-lab-control-plane
fixtures.describe:
Name:                   imagepull-demo
Namespace:              doctor-lab
Replicas:               1 desired | 1 updated | 1 total | 0 available | 1 unavailable
Pod Template:
  Containers:
   app:
    Image:      nginx:this-tag-does-not-exist-99999
Conditions:
  Available      False   MinimumReplicasUnavailable
Events:
  Warning  Failed     3m    kubelet  Failed to pull image "nginx:this-tag-does-not-exist-99999": rpc error: code = NotFound
  Warning  BackOff    2m    kubelet  Back-off pulling image "nginx:this-tag-does-not-exist-99999"
fixtures.logs:
[kubectl exit 1]
Error from server (BadRequest): container "app" in pod "imagepull-demo-5c8d9f7b4-vp3mw" is not running
fixtures.prev_logs:
[kubectl exit 1]
Error from server (BadRequest): container "app" in pod "imagepull-demo-5c8d9f7b4-vp3mw" is not running
fixtures.events:
LAST SEEN   TYPE      REASON    OBJECT                                 MESSAGE
3m          Warning   Failed    pod/imagepull-demo-5c8d9f7b4-vp3mw    Failed to pull image "nginx:this-tag-does-not-exist-99999": rpc error: code = NotFound
2m          Warning   BackOff   pod/imagepull-demo-5c8d9f7b4-vp3mw    Back-off pulling image "nginx:this-tag-does-not-exist-99999"

fixtures.pods:
NAME                        READY   STATUS      RESTARTS   AGE    IP           NODE
oom-demo-6b7c9d8f5-mz4lq   0/1     OOMKilled   8          15m    10.244.0.7   doctor-lab-control-plane
fixtures.describe:
Name:                   oom-demo
Namespace:              doctor-lab
Replicas:               1 desired | 1 updated | 1 total | 0 available | 1 unavailable
Pod Template:
  Containers:
   memory-hog:
    Image:      busybox:1.36
    Limits:
      cpu:     100m
      memory:  32Mi
    Requests:
      cpu:     10m
      memory:  16Mi
Conditions:
  Available      False   MinimumReplicasUnavailable
Events:
  Warning  BackOff    1m    kubelet  Back-off restarting failed container
  Normal   OOMKilling 2m    kubelet  Memory cgroup out of memory: Kill process 12345 (dd): killed
fixtures.logs:
INFO: starting memory allocation loop
INFO: allocating 128M...
fixtures.prev_logs:
INFO: starting memory allocation loop
INFO: allocating 128M...
Killed
fixtures.events:
LAST SEEN   TYPE      REASON      OBJECT                         MESSAGE
2m          Warning   OOMKilling  pod/oom-demo-6b7c9d8f5-mz4lq   Memory cgroup out of memory: Kill process 12345 (dd): killed
1m          Warning   BackOff     pod/oom-demo-6b7c9d8f5-mz4lq   Back-off restarting failed container

description: Pending: pod cannot be scheduled due to insufficient memory on nodes

fixtures.pods:
NAME                           READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE    IP       NODE
resource-hog-9f4b8c7d2-qp5nk   0/1     Pending   0          12m    <none>   <none>
fixtures.describe:
Name:                   resource-hog
Namespace:              doctor-lab
Replicas:               1 desired | 0 ready | 0 available
Pod Template:
  Containers:
   app:
    Image:   nginx:latest
    Requests:
      memory: 8Gi
      cpu:    4
Conditions:
  PodScheduled   False   Unschedulable
Events:
  Warning  FailedScheduling   5m    default-scheduler   0/1 nodes are available: 1 Insufficient memory.
fixtures.logs:
[kubectl exit 1]
Error from server (BadRequest): container "app" in pod "resource-hog-9f4b8c7d2-qp5nk" is not running
fixtures.prev_logs:
[kubectl exit 1]
Error from server (BadRequest): container "app" in pod "resource-hog-9f4b8c7d2-qp5nk" is not running
fixtures.events:
LAST SEEN   TYPE      REASON             OBJECT                              MESSAGE
5m          Warning   FailedScheduling   pod/resource-hog-9f4b8c7d2-qp5nk   0/1 nodes are available: 1 Insufficient memory. preemption: 0/1 nodes are available: 1 No preemption victims found.

description: CreateContainerConfigError: referenced ConfigMap does not exist

fixtures.pods:
NAME                          READY   STATUS                       RESTARTS   AGE    IP       NODE
config-demo-4d5e6f7a8-bq9rt   0/1     CreateContainerConfigError   0          4m     <none>   doctor-lab-control-plane
fixtures.describe:
Name:                   config-demo
Namespace:              doctor-lab
Replicas:               1 desired | 0 ready | 0 available
Pod Template:
  Containers:
   app:
    Image:   nginx:latest
    Environment Variables from:
      app-config   ConfigMap  Optional: false
Conditions:
  Available      False   MinimumReplicasUnavailable
Events:
  Warning  Failed   3m    kubelet   Error: configmap "app-config" not found
fixtures.logs:
[kubectl exit 1]
Error from server (BadRequest): container "app" in pod "config-demo-4d5e6f7a8-bq9rt" is not running
fixtures.prev_logs:
[kubectl exit 1]
Error from server (BadRequest): container "app" in pod "config-demo-4d5e6f7a8-bq9rt" is not running
fixtures.events:
LAST SEEN   TYPE      REASON   OBJECT                            MESSAGE
3m          Warning   Failed   pod/config-demo-4d5e6f7a8-bq9rt   Error: configmap "app-config" not found
